title: mesosphaerum marrubiifolium
intro: Mesosphaerum marrubiifolium, also known as Brazilian lemongrass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum marrubiifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mesosphaerum marrubiifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its health benefits.
